---
title: "test"
format: html
editor: visual
---

UDC codes are from [The National Library of Finland](https://www.kiwi.fi/spaces/Kansallisbibliografiapalvelut/pages/57836458/Monografia-aineiston+UDK-luokituskaavio); new custom abbreviations can be added in [this table](dataTable/data_table.html?path=https://a3s.fi/swift/v1/AUTH_3c0ccb602fa24298a6fe3ae224ca022f/fennica-container/output.tables/udk_monografia.csv).
